subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-07-28 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: Up to the time I was 32 years [old], I never slept in bed, preferring always a piece of mat and as cushion I chose one or two books.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline
